query:
-- How many SasBoss Internet services exist and what are their costs?
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0 OR monthlyCost IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS zero_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_cost
FROM services 
WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND serviceType = 'Internet';

-- For each customer with a SasBoss Internet service, check if they also have a real-provider Internet service
SELECT 
  sb.customerExternalId,
  sb.externalId AS sasboss_svc_id,
  sb.monthlyCost AS sasboss_cost,
  sb.locationAddress AS sasboss_addr,
  real.externalId AS real_svc_id,
  real.supplierName AS real_supplier,
  real.monthlyCost AS real_cost,
  real.locationAddress AS real_addr
FROM services sb
JOIN services real ON real.customerExternalId = sb.customerExternalId
  AND real.supplierName != 'SasBoss'
  AND real.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND real.status != 'terminated'
WHERE sb.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND sb.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND sb.status != 'terminated'
ORDER BY sb.customerExternalId
LIMIT 15;

  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0 OR monthlyCost IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS zero_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_cost
FROM services 
WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND serviceType = 'Internet';

-- For each customer with a SasBoss Internet service, check if they also have a real-provider Internet service
SELECT 
  sb.customerExternalId,
  sb.externalId AS sasboss_svc_id,
  sb.monthlyCost AS sasboss_cost,
  sb.locationAddress AS sasboss_addr,
  real.externalId AS real_svc_id,
  real.supplierName AS real_supplier,
  real.monthlyCost AS real_cost,
  real.locationAddress AS real_addr
FROM services sb
JOIN services real ON real.customerExternalId = sb.customerExternalId
  AND real.supplierName != 'SasBoss'
  AND real.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND real.status != 'terminated'
WHERE sb.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND sb.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND sb.status != 'terminated'
ORDER BY sb.customerExternalId
LIMIT 15;
